query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `obra_ponto_inconsistencies` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `companyId` int NOT NULL,
  `employeeId` int NOT NULL,
  `obraAlocadaId` int,
  `obraPontoId` int NOT NULL,
  `dataPonto` date NOT NULL,
  `snRelogio` varchar(50),
  `status` enum('pendente','esporadico','transferido','ignorado') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
  `resolvidoPor` varchar(255),
  `resolvidoPorUserId` int,
  `resolvidoEm` timestamp,
  `observacoes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `opi_company` (`companyId`),
  INDEX `opi_employee` (`employeeId`),
  INDEX `opi_status` (`status`),
  INDEX `opi_data` (`dataPonto`)
);
